title: PasswordProfile
description: Contains the password profile associated with a user. The passwordProfile property of the user entity is a passwordProfile object.

password.description: The password for the user. Must satisfy the password complexity requirements of the tenant. Required on create.

forceChangePasswordNextSignIn.description: true if the user must change the password on the next sign-in; false otherwise

forceChangePasswordNextSignInWithMfa.description: true if the user must perform multi-factor authentication before being forced to change the password
